_patch_meta.description: Dimension Review C13 Reg 26 (conscience): 8 groups assigned. 2 dimension changes (2739-001 Moral Character→Cognition; 454-001 Cognitive/Mind→Cognition). 1 Session B finding (DIM-26-001 — kil.yah group split question). Registry stamp set.

set.notes: Culpable spiritual ignorance as inner condition — not knowing God's ways becomes basis of moral failure and self-deception. AVs Rom 10:3 and 1Ti 1:13 confirm. Automated label confirmed.

Divine foreknowing as ground of human election and inner identity — genuinely dual subject. The divine act directly constitutes the human person's standing. Automated label confirmed. NONE as dominant subject because the two poles are inseparable.
Divine foreknowledge as sovereign inner cognitive act — the prior knowing grounding redemptive purpose. AV Act 2:23 confirms. Automated label confirmed.
Prophetic foreseeing as inner cognitive capacity — David foreseeing the resurrection. AV Act 2:31 confirms. Subject is David as human prophetic seer. Automated label confirmed.

Inner self-awareness of moral state — cognitive act of consciousness directed at own condition. Changed from automated Moral Character to Cognition — the act described is self-knowing, not a moral quality of character. AV 1Cor 4:4 names the act of awareness directly.

operations.description: 2739-001 sunoida — conscience: Cognition, HUMAN (changed from Moral Character)

set.notes: Conscious inner awareness — moral complicity or cognitive recognition informing volitional response. Non-standard Cognitive/Mind corrected to Cognition. AVs Act 5:2 and Act 12:12 confirm.

operations.description: 454-001 suneidō — conscience: Cognition, HUMAN (corrected from non-standard Cognitive/Mind)

set.notes: Inward parts as seat and constitution of the innermost self — deepest layer God formed and searches. AVs Psa 139:13 and Jer 17:10 confirm. Automated label confirmed.

Inward parts as seat of felt inner experience. Anchor verses evidence primarily positive register — exultation (Pro 23:16) and inner instruction producing blessing (Psa 16:7). Automated label confirmed for AV evidence. Session B finding DIM-26-001 raised: group range may extend to negative experience; Session B to assess whether group should be split.

operations.description: Registry 26 (conscience): Dimension Review complete under v2.2
